atoms.source_hunk_hint: @@ -12,6 +12,10 @@ impl<C: Send + Sync, N: NodePrimitives> CanonStateSubscriptions for NoopProvider
atoms.semantic_claim: NoopProvider implements the blocking canonical-state subscription API as a no-op.
atoms.required_change: If blocking canonical-state subscription is restored, update NoopProvider to satisfy the trait.
atoms.notes: The v2.2 trait lacks this method, so the noop implementation is absent.

summary: NoopProvider's blocking canonical-state subscription adapter is missing because the v2.2 trait lacks the method.
notes: Adapter atom depends on the broader chain-state blocking subscription decision.
